topics.title: Iran-US clash over alleged warship attack in Strait of Hormuz
topics.summary: Iran claims its navy forced a US warship to turn back from the Strait of Hormuz as Washington denies any clash.
topics.reel_text:
Ormuz znowu wraca na pierwszy plan.
Statki, sankcje i nerwy między mocarstwami rosną.
A kiedy ten punkt zapalny się rusza,
świat zaczyna płacić za handel, transport i paliwa.

To nie jest tylko geopolityka.
To jest koszt życia.
topics.post_text:
Iran-US clash over alleged warship attack in Strait of Hormuz

Iran claims its navy forced a US warship to turn back from the Strait of Hormuz as Washington denies any clash.

Tu nie chodzi już tylko o politykę. Jeśli napięcie wokół tego tematu wzrośnie, rynek może przerzucić koszt na paliwo, transport i ceny. I właśnie dlatego to jest temat dla zwykłego człowieka, a nie tylko dla ekspertów.

Myślisz, że to realne zagrożenie dla cen… czy tylko straszenie rynków?
topics.follow_hook: Obserwuj Fabian Talks — bo tu zobaczysz konsekwencje, zanim poczujesz je na rachunku.

topics.title: Hormuz tensions push ceasefire to the brink as Trump threatens Iran
topics.summary: US military says it is encouraging ships to pass through Hormuz Strait, but Iran says it is in full control of waterway.
topics.reel_text:

topics.post_text:
Hormuz tensions push ceasefire to the brink as Trump threatens Iran

US military says it is encouraging ships to pass through Hormuz Strait, but Iran says it is in full control of waterway.

topics.title: Captain warns ‘no ship will be a hero’ by risking Hormuz transit
topics.summary: Captain Raman Kapoor says no vessel will attempt to exit the Strait of Hormuz without assurance of safety.
topics.reel_text:

topics.post_text:
Captain warns ‘no ship will be a hero’ by risking Hormuz transit

Captain Raman Kapoor says no vessel will attempt to exit the Strait of Hormuz without assurance of safety.
